description_long: This is a modern, open-back shelving unit constructed from wood with a rich, medium-brown finish. The design features a series of staggered rectangular compartments of varying sizes, creating a visually dynamic and asymmetrical appearance. The shelves are thick and robust, with no visible doors, handles, or enclosed sections, allowing for easy access from both the front and back. The vertical and horizontal panels are flush and smooth, with sharp, clean edges and a consistent wood grain pattern throughout. The unit stands on a solid base, providing stability and elevating the lowest shelf slightly above the ground. Its open structure makes it suitable for displaying books, decorative items, or storage bins in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential living spaces.
description: A modern, asymmetrical wooden shelving unit with open compartments and a rich brown finish. Its staggered design and open-back structure make it ideal for display or storage in urban interiors.
description_view_0: The shelving unit is seen from the front, showcasing its staggered, open compartments and the full wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the depth of the shelves and the solid, continuous wood panels with no visible openings.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, displaying the open compartments and the same asymmetrical arrangement.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the stepped profile and the thickness of the wooden panels.
